_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide technical assistance on digital evidence matters to appropriate personnel.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in preparing regulatory examination evidence packages, including control narratives, policy documentation, audit trails, and supporting artifacts that demonstrate compliance to examiner standards.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.492), SP-T-004 (SP, cosine: 0.476).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.505). Shared vocabulary: [evidence]. DCWF-only terms [appropriate, assistance, digital, matters, personnel, provide] vs WIDAI-only terms [artifacts, audit, compliance, control, demonstrate, documentation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.853 (P=0.865, R=0.841). P exceeds R by 0.024 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.8%, N:69.7%, C:29.5%). No dominant classification for "Provide technical assistance on digital evidence matters to appropriate personne" vs "Skill in preparing regulatory examination evidence packages, including control n" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.499 ≈ STS 0.505 (gap 0.006). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [evidence] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.5%. Shared tokens: [evidence]. DCWF-only: [appropriate, assistance, digital, matters, personnel, provide]. WIDAI-only: [artifacts, audit, compliance, control, demonstrate, documentation].
